Would You Rather

Would you rather be forced to have at least one arm above your head 24/7 for 4 months, or be forced to walk backwards everywhere you go for one whole year?🚶‍♂️🙋‍♂️

You can alternate which arm is in the air, as long as one is at all times.

Arm0%
Walk backwards0%

0 votes so far
